name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at how things moved at {{orgName}} yesterday. A few new faces reached out, some appointments got booked, and the day rolled along nicely — nothing that needs a fire drill from you.

If anything stands out when you skim the dashboard, it'll be ready when you are. Otherwise, no rush — we've got the front desk handled.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
